title: Image Analysis with AWS Rekognition: Blunted Heels
excerpt: Using AWS Rekognition and IAM access keys to extract image labels and bounding boxes from an artisanal avant-garde shoe design.

title: Serverless AI-Generated TTS: AWS Lambda + Polly
excerpt: Using serverless cloud architecture (AWS Lambda) coupled with AWS Polly to generate an audio file reciting Baudelaire's Parfum Exotique in seconds.
